command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2mcroMLez2dD7B1.d41ce960f4ad --database GKQCuajYkpcdyw75NP8gmu --execute 
ALTER TABLE workforce_agents 
ADD COLUMN nestingStatus ENUM('nesting','active','senior') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'nesting' AFTER agentStatus;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS team_leaders (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  email VARCHAR(320),
  phone VARCHAR(64),
  isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
